title: FlowDoc: Deterministic flow diagrams for reporting guidelines
description: A preset-driven TypeScript engine for producing publication-quality flow diagrams (PRISMA 2020, CONSORT 2010, STROBE; MOOSE/ARRIVE planned) from YAML/JSON/CSV input, exporting SVG, drawio XML, Mermaid, PDF, and PNG. Designed as a 2026-stack alternative to the R/Shiny PRISMA2020 package, with byte-deterministic output and zero runtime dependencies.
